display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
line-height: 170%;

span.style: color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); font-size: 30px; line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Define the business problem, target users, and primary use cases.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Specify the features and capabilities the system must provide.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Define scalability, availability, latency, security, reliability, and other quality attributes.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Estimate users, requests per second (RPS), storage, bandwidth, and projected growth.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Identify core entities, relationships, and business rules.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Select the appropriate architectural style (Monolith, Modular Monolith, Microservices).

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Define clear, consistent, and versionable service interfaces.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Select suitable data stores and design schemas based on access patterns and consistency requirements.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Define caching layers to reduce latency and improve performance.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Use queues, events, and background workers for long-running or decoupled tasks.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Design for horizontal scaling, load balancing, and stateless services.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Address authentication, authorization, encryption, input validation, rate limiting, and secure communication.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Include logging, metrics, distributed tracing, monitoring, and alerting.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Plan for failures using retries, timeouts, circuit breakers, failover, and disaster recovery.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Define deployment strategy, CI/CD, infrastructure, networking, and configuration management.

span.style: font-size: 19px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); line-height: 170%; font-family: Helvetica;
span.span: Support monitoring, maintenance, optimization, scaling, and architectural evolution over time.
